mechanism: OPEC+ spare capacity of 5-6 Mb/d caps crude oil prices and maintains oil contango, enabling the bifurcated signal (tight copper, loose oil) to persist. Without spare capacity, both would tighten simultaneously, re-creating a unified commodity cycle.
regime_dependence: Conditional on no major supply disruption (Strait of Hormuz, Libya). If spare capacity is drawn down below 2 Mb/d, bifurcation collapses.
